creator: naddy@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Sorry, but I won't make Ogg support optional.  It is reasonable to 
expect that Ogg FLAC is supported and libogg is a very lightweight 
dependency.  Removing Ogg support may unexpectedly break or change 
the features of any of the numerous ports that depend on the flac 
port.
